CREATE TABLE DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S VARCHAR, P VARCHAR, O VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S, P, O) VALUES ('http://example.org/ns#x1', 'predicate1', 'object1');
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S, P, O) VALUES ('http://example.org/ns#x2', 'predicate2', 'object2');
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S, P, O) VALUES ('http://example.org/book/book2', 'predicate3', 'object3');
INSERT INTO DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD (S, P, O) VALUES ('http://example.org/books#book4', 'predicate4', 'object4');

SELECT DISTINCT DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID ( /*retval[*/  s1.S /* R */ /*]retval*/ ) AS /*tmpl*/ R FROM DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD AS s1 WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_REGEX ( DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID ( /*retval[*/  s1.S /* R */ /*]retval*/ ), 'http://example.org/ns#.*') OPTION (QUIETCAST);
SELECT DISTINCT s1.S FROM DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD AS s1 JOIN DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD AS s2 ON (DB.DBA.RDF_REGEX(s1.S, 'http://example.org/books#.*') = 1) WHERE s1.P = 'predicate1' OPTION (QUIETCAST);
SELECT DISTINCT s.S FROM (SELECT S FROM DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_REGEX(S, 'http://example.org/.*')) AS s OPTION (QUIETCAST);

SELECT DISTINCT DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID ( /*retval[*/  s1.S /* R */ /*]retval*/ ) AS /*tmpl*/ R FROM DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD AS s1 WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_REGEX (DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID(s1.S), 'http://example.org/books#book[0-9]+') OPTION (QUIETCAST);

SELECT DISTINCT DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID ( /*retval[*/  s1.S /* R */ /*]retval*/ ) AS /*tmpl*/ R FROM DB.DBA.RDF_QUAD AS s1 WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_REGEX (DB.DBA.RDF_QNAME_OF_IID(s1.S), 'http://example.org/ns#x[0-9]{1,2}') OPTION (QUIETCAST);
